Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x08A3 "COSMICPIRATE-8900-08A3" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $8900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Cosmic Pirate.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
The real start address is $0874. However, as part of the startup code between $088A and $0893 copies the modified BASIC and kernal vector data from $0300 - $0333 to $8708, we set our break point at $08A3 instead, meaning the memory is initialised just as it would be by the original loading process.
A small init routine has been added at $8900 which is a copy of the code from $0874 to $0882 which sets the correct VICII settings before starting the game.
